titles.title: My Lord Died for a Kingdom

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My Lord He died for a Kingdom, To redeem the hearts of men; Now my people don’t you weep, He has risen from the dead, He lives again, Hallelujah. Sing hallelujah, the Lord is risen He is risen indeed hallelujah.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My Lord came forth like the morning, With the splendour of the sun, Came triumphant from the womb, From the darkness of the tomb The victory won, hallelujah.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My Lord united out mountains, With the everlasting hills, Now the seasons and the seas sing His song of victory, Rocks and Hills, hallelujah.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My Lord renewed all creation, That had waited late and long; Now we all with one accord, Live and love the risen Lord, This is our song, hallelujah.
